challenge.npc_text: Right. Standard rules. First to five. No pausing. No commentary settings. No excuses.

choices.text: Let's go. I've been reading up.

lose.npc_text: 5-0. Again. You played into every press, you tried to dribble through the box, and you used the same corner routine three times. Same result each time. I feel nothing.

choices.text: I need to think about this.

pre_win.npc_text: Wait. You're... playing differently. You held the line, you pressed at 70%, you didn't panic when I equalised. What happened to you?

choices.text: I've been thinking about the game differently.

win_book.npc_text: 'Winning Ugly'? You read 'Winning Ugly'? That book is... okay that's actually a legitimate psychological framework. I — fine. You won. 3-5. The better tactician won today. I need to sit with this.

win_vague.npc_text: 3-5. You actually won. I don't know what I just watched but it was structured. Like you had a plan and stuck to it. I respect that more than I want to admit.

post_win.npc_text: Look — you won fair. I'm... going to step out for a bit. The lab's yours. Don't touch the compile terminal.
